items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or state checks that confirm the functionality of the scenario 'Cancellation with access until period end'. While the expected result mentions a clear, actionable failure report, there is no supporting evidence that demonstrates this scenario has been tested or validated. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide sufficient context or data to assess the outcome of this specific scenario, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
